name: @prune/bounty
description: F17 — cheapest-context bounty. A contest for the lowest-cost prompt+context that PASSES a frozen quality gate for a recurring task: min-cost subject to quality. Only gate-passing submissions are eligible; the cheapest passing one wins and becomes the default. The quality verdict (passedGate) is caller-fed (the frozen @prune/quality gate); selection is deterministic min-cost with stable tie-breaks. Honest pricing (rank by USD when all priced, else tokens); savings vs a caller-supplied incumbent. No regex, no model.
